name: Go SRT Shell Pack
summary: The Go SRT Shell Pack includes glass capsules that act as herb chambers for the Arizer Go SRT.
description: The Go SRT Shell Pack includes glass capsules that act as herb chambers for the Arizer Go SRT. Designed for convenience and efficiency, these capsules allow for quick loading and easy swapping during use. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
